questionHtml:
Which two species act as Brønsted–Lowry acids in the reaction?

H2PO4− (aq) + OH− (aq) ⇌ HPO42− (aq) + H2O (l)

 

A. HPO42− (aq) and OH− (aq)

B. H2PO4− (aq) and HPO42− (aq)

C. HPO42− (aq) and H2O (l)

D. H2PO4− (aq) and H2O (l)
